name: echo-voice
description: Mobile control surface for running local Codex tasks through a relay.

scripts.check: pnpm run check:js && pnpm run check:shell && pnpm run test
scripts.check:js: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/desktop-agent.js && node --check src/lib/refine.js && node --check src/lib/codexAppServerClient.js && node --check src/lib/codexCommand.js && node --check src/lib/codexInteractiveRunner.js && node --check src/lib/codexQueue.js && node --check src/lib/codexRuntime.js && node --check src/lib/codexStore.js && node --check src/lib/agentIdentity.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/app/core.js && node --check public/app/auth.js && node --check public/app/sessions.js && node --check public/app/codex.js && node --check public/app/index.js && node --check public/sw.js && node --check desktop-settings/app.js && node --check desktop-app/main.cjs && node --check scripts/desktop-settings.js && node --check scripts/network-doctor.js && node --check playwright.config.js && node --check test/e2e/mobile-workbench.spec.js
scripts.check:shell: bash -n scripts/macos-desktop-agent.sh && bash -n scripts/macos-create-app.sh && bash -n scripts/macos-create-dmg.sh && bash -n scripts/deploy-relay.sh && bash -n scripts/desktop-update.sh
